rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NETTIE M. KRAWCZYK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: off calendar, as petition was filed with hearing date of december 10. it is noted that not all heirs waived an accounting as of 9/23/19. providing an accounting does not increase the administration cost of the estate, as that service is part of the services for which the personal representative is paid the statutory fee. in addition, if the petition is amended and filed by 11/22 and noticed by 11/25, requiring an accounting will not delay distribution of the estate.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GUILLERMO COBAR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/12/19. No earlier date available. Petition is still incomplete re all heirs. Notice has not been given to the newly identified heirs. No declination and nomination of the petitioner by Martha Barrientos has been filed. The only proper form of notice is the mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Petititon to Administer Estate. If it appears that property may pass to a citizen of a foreign country, notice must be given to the consular official of that foreign country having an office in the U.S.
